mapper.sql: select task_id, task_title, task_type, biz_type, biz_id, course_id, class_course_id, term_id, task_desc, priority_level, action_type, action_path, action_target_id, publish_time, start_time, due_time, status, target_scope, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sc_learning_task
mapper.insert: insert into sc_learning_task( task_title, task_type, biz_type, biz_id, course_id, class_course_id, term_id, task_desc, priority_level, action_type, action_path, action_target_id, publish_time, start_time, due_time, status, target_scope, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{taskTitle}, #{taskType}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{courseId}, #{classCourseId}, #{termId}, #{taskDesc}, #{priorityLevel}, #{actionType}, #{actionPath}, #{actionTargetId}, #{publishTime}, #{startTime}, #{dueTime}, #{status}, #{targetScope}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from sc_learning_task where task_id in
#{taskId}
mapper.select: select t.task_id as taskId, t.task_title as taskTitle, t.task_type as taskType, t.task_desc as taskDesc, t.priority_level as priorityLevel, t.action_type as actionType, t.action_path as actionPath, t.action_target_id as actionTargetId, t.publish_time as publishTime, t.start_time as startTime, t.due_time as dueTime, t.biz_type as bizType, t.biz_id as bizId, t.course_id as courseId, t.class_course_id as classCourseId, t.term_id as termId, d.dispatch_id as dispatchId, d.user_id as userId, d.dispatch_status as dispatchStatus, d.completion_status as completionStatus, d.completed_time as completedTime, d.read_time as readTime, d.completion_remark as completionRemark from sc_learning_task_dispatch d inner join sc_learning_task t on t.task_id = d.task_id where d.user_id = #{userId} and d.dispatch_status = '0' and t.status = '0' and (t.term_id is null or t.term_id = #{termId}) order by case when d.completion_status = 'PENDING' then 0 else 1 end, case when t.due_time is null then 1 else 0 end, t.due_time asc, t.task_id desc
